name: SimpleTD
short_description: A Simple And Also Complex Tower Defence Game. Build, Loot, Buy & Sell, Level Up, Quest... Controllable Difficulty, Custom Gameplay, Ingame Help.
detailed_description:
The Magic Of This Game: Save You From Gaming Fatigue!!! No Game Addiction. No In-Game Purchases. With Unlimited Customization Level Up, Loot, Combine, Strengthen... And Continues Updates Add More Play Way But Your Old Play Way Can Still Be Effective As Well.

Hold the base at all costs! Fortify your defensive empire amid a barrage of attacks!

Here, every inch of the map is a battlefield! Use defensive towers from your backpack to safeguard the central base, defeat enemies to plunder resources, and exchange for better weapons in the shop to arm your defense line. Remember to resupply when ammo runs out, upgrade skills to double your towers' firepower, and tackle time-limited missions for exclusive rewards! From construction to demolition, resource management to skill combos, every decision determines your base's survival – are you ready to face the enemy onslaught?

Unlock hundreds of tactics! Special warriors + various weapons revolutionize tower defense conventions!

Call upon dozens of special warriors like the Cat Warrior (double damage) and Dragon Warrior (double hit); wield dozens of special weapons, from the Mind Controller (convert enemy units) to the Teleport Gun (fling foes to the ends of the map), for playing enemy as ants! Trigger chain reactions with dozens of status effects like Freeze/Fire/Electric Shock, and disrupt battles with dynamic weather like thunderstorms and acid rain. Want to relocate your base, challenge 100-wave survival, or use a Diamond Hammer to reinforce defenses and a Amulet to revive units? The strategic depth here surpasses all tower defense expectations!

Master of fingertip control! Hotkeys + status chains make you a tower defense pro!

Zoom with the mouse wheel, pause with the spacebar – with hotkeys turn you into an instant operation guru! Strengthen attacks with Rubies, boost attack speed with Black Gems, and build the perfect defense matrix with the Iron Watermelon's "Iron Wall" and Holy Water's "Divine" statuses. Mirror enemy units with Magic Mirrors, unleash ultimate skills with Spell Books, and even execute spatial tactics by moving buildings or setting up teleporters in Interaction Mode! Adjustable difficulty, auto-save progress – from novice to master, every step of growth brings exclusive challenges to conquer!
